title: Render Controller Set
description: Defines geometry, materials, and textures for entity rendering.

render_controllers.description:
Properties:
• geometry (string)
• materials
• textures (string[])
• arrays ({ textures, materials, geometries })
• part_visibility

geometry.title: Geometry
geometry.description: A name or expression that describes which model to use for this item

materials.title: Materials
materials.description: A name or expression that expresses logic for which material to use to display this particular entity

textures.title: Textures
textures.description: A name or expression that expresses logic for which texture to select

arrays.title: Lists
arrays.description: Lists of available textures, materials, and geometries that can be selected

part_visibility.title: Part Visibility
part_visibility.description: Lists of available textures, materials, and geometries that can be selected
